description: This file implements a color mode toggler for Bootstrap's documentation site, allowing users to switch between themes such as light, dark, or auto based on system preferences. It manages theme state using localStorage, updates the DOM to reflect the active theme, and responds to system preference changes.

methods.name: getStoredTheme
methods.description: Retrieves the current theme stored in localStorage.

methods.name: setStoredTheme
methods.description: Stores the selected theme in localStorage.

methods.name: getPreferredTheme
methods.description: Determines the preferred theme based on stored preference or system settings.

methods.name: setTheme
methods.description: Applies the specified theme to the document, considering 'auto' mode.

methods.name: showActiveTheme
methods.description: Updates the UI to reflect the currently active theme and optionally focuses the theme switcher.
